subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.1
question_html:
2.67 g of lead (II) carbonate is decomposed by heating until constant mass.

PbCO3 (s) → PbO (s) + CO2 (g)

What is the final mass of solid?

A.  0.44 g

B.  2.23 g

C.  2.67 g

D.  3.11 g
examiners_html: 76% of candidates correctly identified final mass of solid in the decomposition reaction with little difficulty in using mental math to arrive at the answer.
